description: Design a custom V-block gripper finger for a robotic arm using FreeCAD to pick up 20mm diameter cylindrical stock. The finger must mount to a Robotiq 2F-85 gripper and center the cylinder. The design requires a base block 100 mm (X) x 30 mm (Y) x 15 mm (Z). On the top face (Z=15), include two counterbored holes at (X=15, Y=8) and (X=15, Y=-8) with a 5.5 mm through-hole, 10.0 mm counterbore diameter, and 5.0 mm counterbore depth. On the inner face (Y=15), create a vertical 90-degree V-groove centered at X=85 mm with a depth of 4.0 mm from the face. Save the complete model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/gripper_finger.FCStd.
